trade.summary: Cina is the Regno Unito's second-largest import source. The Regno Unito runs a very large trade deficit with Cina. Regno Unito exports machinery, pharmaceuticals, vehicles, and financial services. Cina exports electronics, clothing, machinery, and consumer goods. Relations have been complicated by Huawei exclusion from Regno Unito 5G network and other technology controls.
disputes: Regno Unito ban on Huawei 5G equipment
Chinese sanctions on Regno Unito MPs and institutions (2021)

diplomatic.summary: Relations have deteriorated sharply from the 'Golden Era' of 2015-2016. The Regno Unito has become one of Cina's most vocal critics in Europe, sanctioning Chinese officials over Xinjiang, condemning erosion of Hong Kong autonomy, and designating Confucius Institutes a security risk. Cina sanctioned Regno Unito MPs. The Regno Unito-Australia-Stati Uniti ARegno UnitoStati Uniti pact and Five Eyes intelligence alliance align Regno Unito firmly against Chinese interests.
recent_incidents: Regno Unito banned Huawei from 5G networks (2020-2027 phase-out)
Regno Unito imposed Xinjiang sanctions; Cina retaliated against Regno Unito MPs
Regno Unito National Security Act targets Chinese interference operations
Chinese espionage cases in Regno Unito Parliament (2024)

military.summary: Firmly in opposing alignments. Regno Unito is a core NATO member, Five Eyes member, and ARegno UnitoStati Uniti partner. Cina views Regno Unito as aligned against Chinese interests. Regno Unito has sent Royal Navy vessels to South Cina Sea and Taiwan Strait. No arms transfers.
incidents: UK Royal Navy freedom of navigation in South China Sea
UK criticized Chinese military exercises near Taiwan
UK charged individuals with espionage for China (2024)

financial.summary: Declining but still significant financial ties. London is a major offshore RMB center but Cina's share of Regno Unito investment is declining. Regno Unito has increased scrutiny of Chinese FDI. Chinese companies (e.g., CATL, Huawei) have Regno Unito operations. Regno Unito pension funds have reduced Cina exposure.

energy.summary: Regno Unito is reviewing Chinese involvement in nuclear power (CGN stake in Hinkley Point C, Bradwell project effectively shelved). Regno Unito imports Chinese solar panels. Limited direct energy trade. Regno Unito reducing strategic energy dependence on Cina.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation is under significant review. Regno Unito universities have been under government pressure to scrutinize Chinese partnerships for security risks. Some partnerships terminated. Joint publications remain high but institutional links are being reviewed under National Security provisions.
